creator: sweetpea-freebsd@tentacle.net
text:
Ah, I see whatﾃ｢ﾂﾂ冱 going onﾃ｢ﾂﾂｦ the cp commands in bsd.pkgng.mk have been changed to cat, but thereﾃ｢ﾂﾂ冱 no redirect to create +INSTALL.

Iﾃ｢ﾂﾂ冦 not sure whether +INSTALL should be overwritten or appended to, but Iﾃ｢ﾂﾂ况e included the following patch assuming overwrite:

--- bsd.pkgng.mk.old	2013-10-30 14:28:30.065727917 -0700
+++ bsd.pkgng.mk	2013-10-30 14:29:22.441694094 -0700
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@
 .endfor
 .undef opt
 	@${ECHO_CMD} "}" >> ${MANIFESTF}
-	@[ -f ${PKGINSTALL} ] && ${CAT} ${PKGINSTALL} ${METADIR}/+INSTALL; \
+	@[ -f ${PKGINSTALL} ] && ${CAT} ${PKGINSTALL} > ${METADIR}/+INSTALL; \
 	${RM} -f ${METADIR}/+PRE_INSTALL ; \
 	for a in ${PKGPREINSTALL}; do \
 		[ -f $$a ] && ${CAT} $$a >> ${METADIR}/+PRE_INSTALL ; \
